title: Remove sticky header behavior and center/clarify header logo

requirements.text: Update the main header so it is not sticky and does not remain fixed while the page scrolls (i.e., remove the sticky positioning behavior so the header is placed at the top of the document flow).

quotes: The three sticky headers shouldn't be sticky. They should be placed entirely at the top of the page.

acceptanceCriteria: When scrolling any page, the header scrolls away with the page content (it is not sticky/fixed).
No header sub-sections (desktop row, mobile search row, mobile nav row) remain stuck to the viewport during scroll.

requirements.text: Center the header logo horizontally within the top header area (desktop and mobile) and increase its visual clarity/visibility (e.g., larger size and stronger contrast against the header background), while preserving the existing logo fallback behavior when the image fails to load.

quotes: The logo should also be centered and much clearer visible

acceptanceCriteria: On desktop widths, the logo appears centered within the header area rather than grouped to the left next to the menu button.
On mobile widths, the logo remains centered in the header area without overlapping other controls.
The logo is visibly clearer than before (increased size and/or contrast), and the text fallback ("SPEAKR") still renders if the image fails to load.

constraints: Frontend must remain React + TypeScript + Tailwind + Shadcn + React Query.
Do not edit files under frontend/src/components/ui (read-only).
Do not edit frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.tsx, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, or frontend/src/main.tsx (immutable paths).
nonGoals: No backend changes (no Motoko actor changes, no persistence changes).
No new navigation routes or new header features beyond removing stickiness and improving logo alignment/visibility.
